lore.story: Once an eccentric master smith, but now an avenger siding with the Abyss.

skill.name: Body of Smith
skill.description:
Terizla gains 1% extra Damage Reduction (up to 20 (+1*Hero Level)%) for every 2.5% HP lost.
He cannot gain extra Attack Speed and will convert every 1% extra Attack Speed he's supposed to receive into 1 extra Physical Attack.

skill.name: Revenge Strike
skill.description: Terizla cracks the ground with his hammer and the fissure will spread out, dealing 300<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. After the fissure hits the first target, it will drill into the target and slow them by 15%. At the same time, Terizla's Movement Speed will be increased by 15% for 3.5s. The fissure on target will then explode, dealing 300<font color="fba51f"> (+80% Extra Physical Attack)</font> plus 20% of the enemy's lost HP <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill.name: Execution Strike
skill.description:
Terizla swings his hammer in a fan-shaped area ahead. This skill can be cast up to 3 times. The first two attacks deal 90<font color="fba51f"> (+135% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each, while the third deals 225<font color="fba51f"> (+220% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>. Enemies hit will also be slowed by 20% for 1.25s (the Slowing Effect can stack).
Deals only 80% damage to Minions.

skill.name: Penalty Zone
skill.description: Terizla jumps to the designated area, dealing 300<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and knocking enemies airborne for 0.6s. He then summons Scaffold and slows enemies by 25%. Scaffold will send out a hook at enemy heroes in range and pull them several times while dealing 150<font color="fba51f"> (+30% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> each time.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In teamfights, Terizla can open with his Ultimate and his 1st Skill to control the enemy team, then use his 2nd Skill to repeatedly hit the targets pulled by the Scaffold.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: In the laning phase, Terizla can use his 1st Skill to slow the enemy, then his 2nd Skill to repeatedly deal damage to them.
